# Deploy AI Red Teaming & Safety Evaluation
## Step 1: Prerequisites
- Azure CLI, Azure AI Foundry access
## Step 2: Execute
az deployment group create -g rg-frootai-ai-red-teaming -f infra/main.bicep
## Step 3: Verify
Check results.
